testcase.name: test_create_contract_with_valid_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_midwife_contract_defaults.py:251: in test_create_contract_with_valid_data assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 404: {"detail":"Client not found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_midwife_contract_defaults.py:277: in test_create_contract_with_minimal_data assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 404: {"detail":"Client not found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
